# Bxc: Zero-Spawn Browser Engine for AI Agents

Bxc (Browser-X) is a native, zero-spawn, high-performance web browser automation engine designed for the Bun runtime. By combining a Rust-compiled FFI bridge, native Zig DOM bindings, and stealth browser profiles, Bxc achieves sub-millisecond execution times for AI agents.

## Core Capabilities
- **Zero-Spawn**: Native, in-process Chromium CDP and Static DOM transports. No heavy Puppeteer/Playwright headless processes.
- **Stealth Profiles**: Automated Cloudflare and Turnstile bot bypass using Ghost browsers, custom fingerprinted V8 profiles, and automated human-interaction click models.
- **Unified Command Profiles**: Every subcommand (`scrape`, `recon`, `mirror`, `challonge`, `har`, `fut`, `voiranime`, `google`) supports 5 profiles:
  - `static`: Extremely fast, in-process HTML parser & DOM selector.
  - `fast`: Full JS execution using the lightweight Lightpanda WebAssembly browser.
  - `http`: Direct TLS-fingerprinted raw HTTP requests (`curl-impersonate`).
  - `stealth`: Ghost browser with stealth headers, user-agents, and fingerprint patches.
  - `max`: Multi-transport fallback loop attempting all profiles until successful.
- **Google Ecosystem Atlas**: Deep auditing of Wiz, Angular, and Lit frontend structures across 5000+ Google domains, with mandate guard compliance and Smart Routing.
- **Specialized Stealth Scrapers**:
  - **FUT**: Scrapes FIFA Ultimate Team prices from FUTBin and stats from FUTGG.
  - **VoirAnime**: Resolves video streaming servers (Vidmoly, Filemoon, Streamhide, etc.) and catalog data.
  - **X.com**: Pulls profile markdown snapshots, screenshots, and processes bio/followers via local AI.
  - **WBO Metagame Tracking**: Automated parsing of tournament podium finishes and player standings from World Beyblade Organization forums.
- **Standalone Portability & FFI Embedding**: Standalone builds (`bun scripts/build-standalone.ts`) embed all native shared libraries and binaries (`libbxc_rust_bridge`, `libcurl-impersonate`, `lightpanda`, `wappalyzergo-cli`) directly. On first run, Bxc extracts them to `~/.bxc/bin/` with proper executable permissions, providing a zero-dependency, single-file cross-platform distribution.

---

## Quick Start (Bun FFI)

```typescript
import { Browser } from "@aphrody-code/bxc";

// Initialize stealth browser
const page = await Browser.newPage({ profile: "stealth" });

// Sub-millisecond navigation
await page.goto("https://example.com");

// Extract clean markdown for LLM context
const markdown = await page.markdown();
console.log(markdown);

await page.close();
```

---

## 🛠️ CLI Interface

Bxc features a powerful, modular, agent-friendly CLI. Subcommands dynamically load their required dependencies (such as Rust FFI, SQLite, or browser layers) lazily.

```bash
# Recon, Detect & Scrape
bxc recon https://google.com --profile stealth
bxc detect https://design.google --json
bxc scrape https://example.com "h1" --profile max

# Google Search (using stable udm=14 Web view)
bxc search "bun runtime" --num 5 --json

# Google Ecosystem & Mandate Client/Auditor
bxc google search "how does V8 FFI work"
bxc google open https://accounts.google.com --profile stealth
bxc google audit https://mail.google.com https://docs.google.com

# X.com profile scraper
bxc xcom profile @elonmusk --screenshot --ai-extract

# FIFA Ultimate Team stats & price scrapers
bxc fut price https://www.futbin.com/26/player/123/name --profile max
bxc fut player https://www.fut.gg/players/123-name/

# VoirAnime streaming catalog search & resolver
bxc voiranime search "inazuma"
bxc voiranime resolve https://embed-provider.com/embed/123

# World Beyblade Organization community scraping & Challonge
bxc worldbeyblade profile aphrody --pretty
bxc challonge https://challonge.com/tournament-slug

# Local web dashboard & JSON API server
bxc api
# or
bun run server:start
```

---

## 🤖 Native MCP Tools Reference

Bxc registers these stdio MCP tools under the `bxc-native-mcp` server:

- **`tune_memory_sqlite`**: Store/retrieve memory facts in the local SQLite db.
- **`bxc_scrape_markdown`**: Convert any target page to GFM markdown.
- **`bxc_detect_frameworks`**: Identify site frameworks and bot protections.
- **`bxc_cdp_evaluate`**: Run raw JS inside the V8 context.
- **`bxc_search`**: High-performance rich Google searches.
- **`bxc_google_fetch`**: Fetch markdown and JSON-LD/meta tags in one pass.
- **`bxc_wbo_rankings`**: Query WBO player standings & leaderboards.
- **`bxc_wbo_metagame`**: Query WBO Beyblade X competitive metagame stats.
- **`bxc_recon`**: Full one-shot URL reconnaissance (CDN, headers, frameworks, CSS selectors, assets).
- **`bxc_mirror`**: Download and mirror a complete site layout locally.
- **`bxc_challonge`**: Extract a structured typed snapshot of any Challonge tournament page.
- **`bxc_worldbeyblade`**: Full forum automation (check status, get profile, thread, subforum post list, private message inbox & sending).
- **`bxc_actor_run`**: Execute an Apify-compatible Actor from a local path, directory, or remote Git repository.
- **Unified Browser Tools**: Persistent browser automation primitives:
  - **`browser_navigate`**: Navigate the active page to a URL and wait for load.
  - **`browser_snapshot`**: Get current page title, URL, and markdown content.
  - **`browser_click`**: Click an element matching a CSS selector.
  - **`browser_fill`**: Set the value of an input element.
  - **`browser_type`**: Type text into an input element.
  - **`browser_press_key`**: Dispatch keyboard key presses.
  - **`browser_select_option`**: Select an option from a `<select>` dropdown.
  - **`browser_evaluate`**: Evaluate JS expressions in the page context.
  - **`browser_wait_for`**: Wait for a CSS selector to appear in the DOM.
  - **`browser_screenshot`**: Capture a PNG screenshot of the viewport.
  - **`browser_close`**: Close the active page and release the browser state.
- **Specialized Stealth Scrapers**: Exposes Bxc's advanced stealth scrapers directly:
  - **`bxc_fut_price`**: Get player console/PC price from FUTBin.
  - **`bxc_fut_player`**: Get player statistics and traits from FUTGG.
  - **`bxc_voiranime_search`**: Search for animes in the catalog.
  - **`bxc_voiranime_info`**: Retrieve anime series metadata and episode list.
  - **`bxc_voiranime_resolve`**: Resolve video streaming servers from iframe embeds.
  - **`bxc_xcom_profile`**: Scrape Twitter profile markdown snapshots, screenshots, and AI info.

---
